title: veronica calycina var. gunnii
intro: Veronica calycina var. gunnii, also known as Gunn's Speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Veronica calycina var. gunnii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin issues and other health concerns.
